title: Benchmark Litigation Canada recognizes McCarthy Tétrault’s Litigation Strength
content:
## Benchmark Litigation Canada recognizes McCarthy Tétrault’s Litigation Strength
Toronto. May 11, 2023. In recognition of the firm’s outstanding work on Turpin v. TD Asset Management , McCarthy Tétrault received a 2023 Impact Case award at the Benchmark Litigation Canada Awards on May 10. The firm represented TD Asset management Inc., with a team co-led by Jill Yates and Shane D’Souza , and supported by Kevan Hanowski , Jenn Choi , Victoria Tortora , and Sean Sadler .
Additionally, the firm received the Health Law/Medical Firm of the Year award, and Michael Feder received the British Columbia Litigator of the Year award.
Benchmark also recently released their 12 th edition of the Benchmark Litigation Canada directory , where 43 lawyers were named Litigation Stars, and 17 were named Future Stars.
As well, Sarit Batner and Michael Feder were once again named among the Top 50 Trial lawyers in the country in recognition of their outstanding and innovative work, and exceptional client service.
Focused on ranking top litigation work across key industry sectors, Benchmark Litigation compiles its rankings through an extensive research process, including interviews with both our peers and clients.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information on McCarthy Tétrault or any of the above, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
